existing_loans_org_isolation.name: existing_loans_org_isolation
existing_loans_org_isolation.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deals d WHERE d.id = existing_loans.deal_id AND d.organization_id::text = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true))

existing_loans_recording_xor.name: existing_loans_recording_xor
existing_loans_recording_xor.value: NOT ("existing_loans"."recorded_reel_page" IS NOT NULL AND "existing_loans"."recorded_crfn" IS NOT NULL)

properties_org_isolation.name: properties_org_isolation
properties_org_isolation.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deals d WHERE d.property_id = properties.id AND d.organization_id::text = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true))

parties_org_isolation.name: parties_org_isolation
parties_org_isolation.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deals d WHERE d.id = parties.deal_id AND d.organization_id::text = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true))

documents_org_isolation.name: documents_org_isolation
documents_org_isolation.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deals d WHERE d.id = documents.deal_id AND d.organization_id::text = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true))

documents_recording_xor.name: documents_recording_xor
documents_recording_xor.value: NOT ("documents"."recorded_reel_page" IS NOT NULL AND "documents"."recorded_crfn" IS NOT NULL)

attorney_approvals_org_isolation.name: attorney_approvals_org_isolation
attorney_approvals_org_isolation.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM documents doc JOIN deals d ON doc.deal_id = d.id WHERE doc.id = attorney_approvals.document_id AND d.organization_id::text = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true))
